etymology.description: semantic ÁéČ(ÁéČ) (y√Ļ, 'jade') + phonetic Śģó(Śģó) (zŇćng) -> a type of jade object
etymology.interpretation: ÁéČ(ÁéČ) (y√Ļ, 'jade') signifies the character's connection to jade artifacts, while Śģó(Śģó) (zŇćng) provides the sound. Áźģ(c√≥ng) refers specifically to an ancient ritual jade object with a round exterior and a square interior, used in ceremonial contexts, highlighting the importance of jade in ancient Chinese culture.
